title: Türkiye ile Çin Arasındaki Diplomatik İlişkilerin 50. Yılı
content:
Öğrenci

Haberler

Detay

"Our photo exhibition titled "The 50th Anniversary of Diplomatic Relations Between Turkey and China" was held. At the event, our Rector Prof. Dr. Turgut ÖZKAN, Consul General of the People's Republic of China Wei CUI, President of Turkish-Chinese Cultural Association İrfan KARSLI and Head of International Trade and Management Department of our University Assoc. Dr. A. Murat KÖSEOĞLU delivered their speech.

The importance of the following subjects was emphasized in this event: Turkish and Chinese relations began thousands of years ago with the historical Silk Road. Diplomatic relations between the Republic of Turkey and the People's Republic of China began 50 years ago. It is important to carry the bond established with the “Belt and Road” project even further."
